rootCause: Multiple process definitions, including arduino-thermistor-read used by geothermal/calibrate-ground-sensor, had empty createItems arrays, allowing process completion without producing a tangible artifact.
resolution: Added a regression test that requires every process to create at least one inventory item, added process completion outputs for all previously empty process definitions, created reusable documentation items (including a thermistor calibration log sheet), and updated geothermal calibration quest/doc gates to require the generated calibration log before finishing.
